items.name: Bread and Hummus for Two
items.description: Prairie Boy organic country white, house made hummus with paprika and tahini

items.name: Romaine Hearts
items.description: Caesar dressing, chopped egg, Parmesan and toasted bread crumbs

items.name: Foie Gras Terrine
items.description: Sea salt brioche, pickled grapes, riesling jelly, Triple crunch mustard, toasted hazelnuts and sour cherry reduction

items.name: 30g Northern Divine Caviar
items.description: Sustainably harvested Canadian caviar, creme fraiche, shallots, chives and buckwheat blini

items.name: Yellowfin Tuna Tartare
items.description: Sashimi grade tuna in a soy lime marinade, avocado, coriander, sesame tempura and chili lime sauce

items.name: Beet Salad
items.description: Italian hazelnuts, Belgian endive, shaved fennel, radicchio and citrus whipped Manchego crema. Chardonnay vinaigrette

items.name: Grilled Octopus
items.description: Navy beans, black olives, roasted peppers and chorizo sausage in a smoked tomato broth. Romesco and fine olive oil

items.name: Caramelized Shallot Gnocchi
items.description: Shredded duck confit, parsnip crema, Brussels sprouts and wild mushrooms. Duck jus and balsamic brown butter

items.name: Oysters
items.description: Fresh oysters on the half shell. Lemon, horseradish and red wine mignonette

items.name: Scallops
items.description: Spiced Ontario cauliflower tempura, beech mushrooms, sauteed spinach, white wine poached apples, lemon and chili. Saffron tomato vinaigrette and vadouvan oil

items.name: Peppercorn Fettucine
items.description: Beef tenderloin, oyster mushrooms, Madeira cream, pine nuts and gruyere bread crumb crust

items.name: Lobster
items.description: Butter poached half lobster. Saffron seafood risotto, oven dried cherry tomatoes. Pesto and fine olive oil

items.name: Halibut
items.description: Pan roasted. Pickled celeriac, Brussels sprouts leaves, Triple crunch mustard, maitake mushrooms. Truffled beurre fondue

items.name: Rack of Lamb
items.description: Salsa verde crusted. Sauteed rapini, marinated cherry tomatoes, whipped chick pea puree and Sicilian green olives. Natural jus and goat cheese fondue

items.name: Roasted Quebec Chicken
items.description: Harissa roasted carrots, preserved lemon, globe artichokes, Swiss chard, cippolini onions, lentils, Greek yoghurt and crispy onions. Dark chicken jus

items.name: Filet Mignon
items.description: Grilled Ontario AAA. Crispy potato tossed in lemon parsley butter. Green beans, mushrooms, blue cheese butter and red wine jus

items.name: Duck
items.description: Smoked and roasted breast. Butternut squash, grilled treviso, toasted walnuts, golden raisins, escarole and seasonal wild mushrooms. Natural jus

items.name: Parmesan Fries
items.description: Fries with parmesan

items.name: Whipped Potatoes
items.description: Whipped potatoes

items.name: Sauteed Greens
items.description: Sauteed seasonal greens
